title: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Expands in New York With MTIA Buyout
text: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co.'s (AJG) pending buyout of M&T Insurance Agency is likely to help the acquirer expand in New York. Also, AJG will become the preferred insurance broking partner of M&T Bank.
